news_items.headline: 2026 MLB awards tracker: Odds for MVP, Cy Young, Rookie of the Year
news_items.description: Who are the favorites to win seasonlong honors? Here are the odds for MVP, Cy Young and Rookie of the Year in the AL and NL.

news_items.headline: Every team's odds to win the World Series: Dodgers lead, Brewers and Phillies improve
news_items.description: Every MLB team's odds to win the 2026 World Series, led by the Dodgers. Phillies, Brewers coming on strong.

news_items.headline: Wimbledon's strawberries and cream leads sports world's signature food, drink staples
news_items.description: The refreshing concoction is an All England Lawn Tennis and Croquet Club staple, but Wimbledon isn't the only event associated with a signature food or beverage item.

news_items.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Team hitting ratings
news_items.description: Stay ahead of the game and optimize your fantasy baseball hitters with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's hitting matchups as well as the potential for stolen bases.

news_items.headline: Fantasy baseball forecaster: Pitcher projections for the next 10 days
news_items.description: Keep up to date on who is pitching -- and how well they're expected to do -- with our forecaster, which provides a rolling 10-day outlook of every team's probable starting pitchers with game score projections.
